goal: Remove DSL parser, consolidate modules, add Firestore codegen opt-in, rename IR types, tighten field validation — pre-Plan C cleanup

steps.action: [CHECKPOINT] Run complexity review on modules/cli-type-generator/src/tagged-type-generator.js and src/codegen/firestore-serialization.js. Report style card violations found. Wait for approval before proceeding.
steps.note: Both files isCompliant: true. firestore-serialization.js has COMPLEXITY: cohesion-structure (informational). toDescriptor drops unknown properties — need to pass firestore through.

steps.action: Write failing test: generate a Tagged type WITHOUT firestore field — output must not contain toFirestore/fromFirestore methods. Generate same type WITH firestore: true — output must contain them. Add to existing generator test file. Run style validator on test file.
steps.note: As planned. 6 failures: 4 Tagged (no flag) + 2 TaggedSum (no flag). With-firestore tests pass already.

steps.action: Modify tagged-type-generator.js: check type definition for `firestore: true`. When absent/false, skip FirestoreSerialization codegen (toFirestore, fromFirestore, _toFirestore, _fromFirestore). When true, generate as before. Also handle TaggedSum types in the same file. Run style validator — verify isCompliant: true.
steps.note: As planned. Also modified to-descriptor.js to pass firestore through. Updated 4 test type definitions (many-lookup-tables, custom-serialization, event, notification) and 2 Date array validation tests to include firestore: true. 497 tests passing.

steps.action: Add `firestore: true` to all curb-map type definitions (11 files in modules/curb-map/type-definitions/: action, action-request, audit-record, operation-details, blockface, member, organization, organization-member, project, segment, user). Run style validator on changed files.
steps.note: As planned. All 11 files updated (9 tagged, 2 taggedSum).

steps.action: Run `yarn types:generate-all`. Verify: (a) curb-map generated types still have toFirestore/fromFirestore, (b) quicken-web-app generated types no longer have them. Update cli-type-generator test expectations for non-firestore output where needed. Run all generator tests and quicken-web-app tests.
steps.note: As planned. curb-map: 11 files with Firestore methods. quicken-web-app: 0 files. 497+604 tests pass.

steps.action: Spawn jeff-js-reviewer and code-simplicity-reviewer on staged changes. Fix blocking issues.
git add changed files. Commit: 'Add Firestore codegen opt-in — default off, curb-map opts in'. Use commit-changes.md format.
steps.note: Also excluded *.type.js from style validator in lint-staged (type defs are a DSL). Reverted unnecessary ABOUTME/section fixes to curb-map files.

steps.action: Merge quicken-type-definitions/field-types.js into quicken-web-app/type-definitions/field-types.js: add 6 entity ID regexes (categoryId, lotAllocationId, lotId, priceId, tagId, transactionId). Remove duplicates (accountId, securityId already exist). Run style validator.
steps.note: As planned. Added 6 regexes in alphabetical order among the entity IDs.

steps.action: Move 10 entity .type.js files from modules/quicken-type-definitions/ to modules/quicken-web-app/type-definitions/ (account, category, holding, lot, lot-allocation, price, security, split, tag, transaction). Update type-mappings.js: remove sources.quickenTypes, remove qifAndWeb alias, add entries under quicken-web-app source using `const s = sources; const t = targets` shorthand. Insert entity type entries BEFORE action.type.js (ordering constraint — Action references them). Delete modules/quicken-type-definitions/ directory. Run style validator on type-mappings.js.

Run `yarn types:generate-all`. Run quicken-web-app tests (`yarn --cwd modules/quicken-web-app tap`). Fix any test failures caused by the consolidation (e.g., test fixtures using short-form IDs that now fail transactionId regex validation). Run all tests until green.
steps.note: generate-all succeeded. 3 test files failed: matching-transfer, query-execution-engine, query-pipeline — all due to short-form IDs (cat_food, tx01, txn_checking) that don't match new entity ID regexes. Fixed import path in transaction-text-matching (pointed to deleted quicken-type-definitions). Updated all fixture IDs to valid format (txn_000000000001, cat_000000000001, etc.). 604+497 tests pass.

steps.action: Spawn jeff-js-reviewer and code-simplicity-reviewer on staged changes. Fix blocking issues.
steps.note: Both flagged inconsistent s/t vs sources/targets aliases in type-mappings.js (jeff: blocking, simplicity: cosmetic). Fixed: removed s/t aliases, used sources/targets consistently. simplicity: APPROVE, jeff: 1 blocking (fixed) + 3 non-blocking (stale docs — will address in step 31).

steps.action: git add changed files. Commit: 'Consolidate quicken-type-definitions into quicken-web-app — single module, merged field-types'. Use commit-changes.md format.

Delete src/query-language/query-parser.js (692 lines), test/query-language/query-parser.tap.js (1,006 lines), and src/query-language/claude-generation-prompt.md (163 lines — DSL documentation, no longer relevant).
steps.note: As planned. 3 files deleted. Remaining imports in query-pipeline.js, query-validator.tap.js, query-execution-engine.tap.js will be addressed in steps 15, 27.

steps.action: [CHECKPOINT] Run complexity review on src/query-language/query-pipeline.js (38 lines). Report violations. Wait for approval.
steps.note: isCompliant: true, 0 violations. 38-line file with clean parse→validate→execute pipeline.

steps.action: Modify query-pipeline.js: change signature from queryPipeline(queryString, dataSummary, state) to queryPipeline(ir, dataSummary, state). Remove parser import, parse step, and MAX_QUERY_SIZE string-length guard (dead code after signature change). Pipeline becomes: validate IR → execute IR → return result. Run style validator.
steps.note: As planned. Removed parser import, MAX_QUERY_SIZE constant, and parse step. Pipeline is now validate→execute. isCompliant: true.

steps.action: [CHECKPOINT] Run complexity review on test/query-language/query-pipeline.tap.js (280 lines). Report violations. Wait for approval.

Rewrite query-pipeline.tap.js: replace query string inputs with direct IR construction using current type constructors (QueryIR(), QuerySource(), QueryFilter(), Computation(), etc. — rename has not happened yet, step 27 will update names). Tests should verify validate → execute flow with well-formed IR objects. Run style validator.
steps.note: As planned. Removed 2 parse-dependent tests (oversized query, bad syntax) since parser is gone. Remaining 5 tests construct IR directly using QueryIR(), QuerySource(), etc. isCompliant: true.

steps.action: Run all quicken-web-app tests. Verify parser-dependent tests are gone and remaining tests pass.
steps.note: 366 passing, 2 failing (query-execution-engine + query-validator still import deleted parser — fixed in step 27). Parser test file deleted. Pipeline test rewritten with direct IR.

steps.action: Spawn jeff-js-reviewer and code-simplicity-reviewer on staged changes. Fix blocking issues.
steps.note: Both flagged same bug: expression IR in pipeline test didn't match description (Binary('-'...) vs abs(food.total)). Fixed. Both APPROVE after fix.

steps.action: git add changed files. Commit: 'Remove DSL parser — Claude constructs IR directly'. Use commit-changes.md format.

Add new FieldTypes entries to quicken-web-app/type-definitions/field-types.js: arithmeticOp (/^[/+*-]$/), timeUnit (/^(months|days|weeks|years)$/), namedPeriod (/^(last_quarter|last_month|last_year|this_quarter|this_month|this_year|year_to_date)$/), accountType (/^(Bank|Cash|Credit Card|Investment|Other Asset|Other Liability|401\(k\)\/403\(b\))$/). Do NOT add filterField or builtinFunction — single-consumer regexes stay inline in the type definition. Run style validator.

Rename and tighten type definitions (batch 1 — 5 files): (a) domain.type.js → ir-domain.type.js (name: 'IRDomain'), (b) date-range.type.js → ir-date-range.type.js (name: 'IRDateRange', Relative.unit → FieldTypes.timeUnit, Named.name → FieldTypes.namedPeriod), (c) expression-node.type.js → ir-expression.type.js (name: 'IRExpression', Binary.op → FieldTypes.arithmeticOp, Call.fn: keep inline /^abs$/, Reference.field → /^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$/), (d) computation.type.js → ir-computation.type.js (name: 'IRComputation'), (e) result-tree.type.js → ir-result-tree.type.js (name: 'IRResultTree'). Run style validator on each.

Rename and tighten type definitions (batch 2 — 5 files): (a) query-ir.type.js → query.type.js (name: 'Query'), (b) query-source.type.js → ir-source.type.js (name: 'IRSource'), (c) query-filter.type.js → ir-filter.type.js (name: 'IRFilter', Equals.field → inline /^(category|account|payee|accountType)$/, OlderThan.field → /^lastActivity$/), (d) query-output.type.js → ir-output.type.js (name: 'IROutput'), (e) query-result.type.js → ir-result.type.js (name: 'IRResult', source fields on Identity, Comparison, and FilteredEntities variants only → FieldTypes.sourceName — Scalar has no source field). Update cross-references in Query type definition (IRSource, IRComputation, IROutput). Also tighten Account.type → FieldTypes.accountType in the moved entity type file (account.type.js). Run style validator.
Update type-mappings.js: replace old file names with new names for all 10 renamed type definitions. Remove old entries, add new ones in alphabetical order. Run style validator.

Delete old generated type files from src/types/ (query-ir.js, query-source.js, query-filter.js, query-output.js, query-result.js, computation.js, expression-node.js, domain.js, date-range.js, result-tree.js). Run `yarn types:generate-all` to create new files with new names. Verify new generated files exist and index.js is updated.

Update imports in src/query-language/ files (4 files: query-pipeline.js, query-execution-engine.js, query-validator.js, resolve-expression.js). Replace old type names with new IR-prefixed names in imports and all references. Run style validator on each.

Update imports in test/ files (4 files: query-execution-engine.tap.js, query-validator.tap.js, query-pipeline.tap.js, expression-evaluator.tap.js). Replace old type names with new IR-prefixed names in imports and all references. Run style validator on each.
Run all quicken-web-app tests. Verify all pass.
Spawn jeff-js-reviewer and code-simplicity-reviewer on staged changes. Fix blocking issues.
git add changed files. Commit: 'Rename query engine types with IR prefix, tighten field validation'. Use commit-changes.md format.
Update docs/architecture/financial-query-language.md: remove DSL/parser references, document IR-direct construction model, update all type names to new IR-prefixed names.
git add changed files. Commit: 'Update architecture docs for IR-direct model and type renames'. Use commit-changes.md format.

verification: All quicken-web-app tests pass (yarn --cwd modules/quicken-web-app tap)
quicken-web-app generated types do NOT have toFirestore/fromFirestore
All query engine types have IR prefix (IRSource, IRFilter, IRComputation, IRExpression, IRDateRange, IRDomain, IRResultTree, IROutput, IRResult) with root type named Query
DataSummary and AccountSummary keep their names (not IR types)
No generic 'String' fields remain where a specific regex/FieldTypes reference was identified in the brainstorm
yarn types:generate-all succeeds with no errors
